title: Activity
description: List of board items for a Houston agent. Status is the engine-owned lifecycle enum. Lease metadata is stored separately in ~/.houston/runtime/leases.json (engine-only, outside agent-writable space) so it can't be forged from inside the agent's working tree.

status.description: queued: created, no CLI yet. running: engine has an active lease in the runtime store, CLI streaming. needs_you: stream ended cleanly, awaiting user. done: closed by user. error: stream ended with error. cancelled: user clicked Stop. interrupted: reaper found a stale lease, click Resume to continue.
